Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Looks like we've reached the first goal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This place was bigger than I thought. How many more times we gotta do this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}But judging by the Desert of Doors, I'm betting it's not going to be just once or twice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ugh... I was afraid you'd say that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}We're looking for the source of our troubles, so logically, it should be at the deepest level.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Then all we can do is keep going until we reach the end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It's like Tartarus all over again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}The two of them do share some similarities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Like the friggin' Shadows wandering around...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Man... And here I thought we were done with 'em for good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The Lost are all gone now, though... So why are we still dealin' with the Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Only way to know is to start looking for an answer... Not like we're getting out of this until we find one, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}After the hell we went through, we finally had some peace...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 30 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}I told myself I'd focus on the future, and not look back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But now it feels like nothing's changed! I thought we were through with fighting![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Time doesn't flow normally here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}So it's no surprise you feel that way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You'll find that there will be many opportunities to revisit your past here.[n]{f 1 1}
